# pai help

> Show the man page for a command area (pai help <area>), or list all areas

## Synopsis

```
pai help [area] [options]
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Kind |
|----------|------|
| `[area]` | optional |

## Options

| Option | Description | Default |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `--raw` | Print raw markdown without terminal styling |  |
